name: useSkill
description: Load a skill file (workflow, prompt template, script, or configuration) for the agent to apply. Returns the file content for immediate processing.
intent: load a skill file for the agent to use
examples: Use the data-analysis skill from skills/data-analysis.md
Load the export workflow from workflows/export.ts
Apply the system prompt prompt defined in prompts/system-v2.txt
whenToUse: The user wants the agent to apply an existing skill, workflow, or prompt template.
The target file defines reusable behavior (markdown, TypeScript, txt) under a known skills directory.
The agent should load the file's content as instructions, not as data to query.
whenNotToUse: The user wants to read a normal source file (not a skill definition). Use readFile instead.
The user wants to search inside many skill files. Use grep instead.
The user wants to run a skill as a shell command. Use runCommand instead.

filePath.description: Relative path to the skill file (e.g., 'skills/data-analysis.md', 'workflows/export.ts', 'prompts/system-v2.txt')

baseDir.description: Base directory to resolve the skill path against (defaults to '.')
